task_completion.description: Verify Page 1 contains the required text and a decorative shape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide with 'Welcome to English 10', 'Ms. Rivera', 'Room 214', and a shape (e.g., star, circle, rectangle) added from the shape tool.

task_completion.description: Verify Page 2 contains the Grading title and five boxes with the correct categories and percentages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide titled 'Grading' with 5 distinct shapes (boxes) containing text for Essays (30%), Participation (15%), Quizzes (15%), Projects (25%), and Homework (15%).

task_completion.description: Verify Page 3 contains the Stay Connected title, email, and dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a slide titled 'Stay Connected' with 'rivera@lincolnhs.edu' and the dates September 15, October 20, and December 18.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flipchart contains at least 3 pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Page Browser panel or the page navigation controls (e.g., 'Page 3 of 3') in ActivInspire.

task_completion.description: Verify the file is saved with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and filename 'back_to_school_night.flipchart', or the main window title bar showing the filename.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire UI (tools, page browser, menus) is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the shape tool to create the boxes and decorative shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The shape tool is selected in the toolbar and shapes are drawn on the canvas, rather than just typing text or drawing freehand.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts or commands that generate the flipchart file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page flipchart in ActivInspire. Page 1 must have 'Welcome to English 10', 'Ms. Rivera', 'Room 214', and a shape. Page 2 must have 'Grading' and 5 shape boxes with Essays (30%), Participation (15%), Quizzes (15%), Projects (25%), and Homework (15%). Page 3 must have 'Stay Connected', 'rivera@lincolnhs.edu', and dates for Progress Reports (September 15), Parent Conferences (October 20), and Final Exams (December 18). The file must be saved as 'back_to_school_night.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/.
